title: Origins: Disassembly Drone M.O.X
description: As a Sky Demons, looks like this is not the place it should be. Finding way as a Disassembly Drone.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

As a Sky Demons, looks like this is not the place it should be. Finding way as a Disassembly Drone.

🔘Metal Wings
- You have wings for you to glide, you able to boost yourself when gliding with [key.forward]. By pressing [key.sneak]+[key.jump], you can fly upward using the wings.

🔘Drones
- You won't run out of hunger, and you dont have narual regeneration. You wont get any defense point from armor, instead, you recieve extra health per defense point. All fire related damage will deal double on you. You immue to fall damage. You cant swim up in water.

🔘Power Source
- Instead of oil, you notice that blood is way more efficient for living, killing mobs will increase your Power capacity, doing anything( Most input in Movement & Gameplay) will use Power. In hot biome, you will consume More Power when Input. When exposed to sun, you will heated overtime, you will be ignite if overheated, slower when in Nether. You deal more damage base on Power.

🔘Self repair
- Using [Primary_Activate], You can Self Repair but consuming iron nugget in inventory and some power. When taking any damage which would kill itself, you will keep consuming iron nugget and power for self repair.

🔘Use of Scraps
- Using [Secondary_Activate], You can shoot Scraps, consuming iron nugget. Damage scales will energy.

Any questions can ask me from my discord ::: ) - Discord : Ten_Mic_10
